title: Director, Product Management
basic: Experience as a leader in Product Management, managing and developing teams of PMs (including people managers) and driving recruiting efforts.
Experience leading a line of business, driving product strategy, and delivering measurable outcomes.
Previous experience as an engineer or extensive technical knowledge to discuss complex technical concepts with customers and internal teams.
Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or Engineering, or equivalent experience.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with experience presenting and defending ideas to both technical and non-technical audiences.
bonus: Product management experience at a SaaS company with a focus on Infrastructure monitoring.

title: Manager I, Engineering - APM SDK Capabilities
basic: Experienced Engineering Manager with a track record of shipping products.
Experience with two or more programming languages and building cross-runtime systems.
Deep experience working on or with observability tooling.
Focus on developer experience, designing clean APIs, and building reliable systems.
Ability to connect high-level product strategy to low-level technical implementation details.
bonus: Experience in SDK/library development or Open Source Software (OSS) development.

title: Manager I, Engineering - APM SDK Capabilities
basic: Experience as an Engineering Manager with a proven track record of shipping products.
Proficiency in two or more programming languages and experience building cross-runtime systems.
Deep experience working on or with observability tooling.
A strong focus on developer experience, designing clean APIs, and building reliable systems.
Ability to connect high-level product strategy to technical implementation details.
bonus: Experience with SDK/library development or Open Source Software (OSS) development.

title: Product Manager
basic: 5+ years of experience in Product Management.
Ability to perform systems thinking, from modeling technical data relationships to collaborating with design on holistic UX flows.
Strategic ability to define a compelling product vision and roadmap to solve critical customer problems.
Strong execution skills, including creating and evangelizing a roadmap, breaking down projects into MVPs, and shipping with high velocity.
Customer-centric approach with experience in user research, persona analysis, and problem definition.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, including writing clear product specs and engaging in deep technical discussions with engineers and designers.
Experience mentoring other team members and contributing to team growth and best practices.
Growth mindset with a curiosity and openness to feedback and learning.
bonus: Preferred background in B2B/enterprise platforms, complex data models and visualizations, or human-centric UX.
Demonstrated curiosity and willingness to learn and leverage AI tools and emerging technologies.

title: Product Manager
basic: 8+ years of product management experience in high-growth enterprises, owning technology roadmaps, vision, and business outcomes.
Experience defining strategy and managing a digital MarTech stack, including CDPs (e.g., Segment), personalization platforms (e.g., Optimizely), and marketing automation tools (e.g., Iterable).
Experience driving AI/LLM use cases in marketing, such as audience building, content generation, or predictive scoring.
Understanding of Product-Led Growth (PLG) and Sales-Led Growth (SLG) motions.
Experience working in a demanding, cross-functional, and agile environment with diverse stakeholders.
Experience mentoring and coaching other product owners in a global setting.
bonus: Demonstrated curiosity about emerging AI tools and technologies with a willingness to learn and leverage them.

title: Product Manager, Fields & Types Experience
basic: 6+ years of experience as a Product Manager, with at least 1-2 years in B2B SaaS.
Experience with customer-centric product development, including direct customer interaction and synthesizing user research.
Strong communication and collaboration skills, with experience working effectively with cross-functional teams (design, engineering, business) and writing precise product specifications.
Ability to think systemically to create solutions that simplify complex use cases.
Strategic thinking ability to provide product insights and address critical customer issues.
Proven ability to execute projects with high velocity, using MVPs and iterative delivery.
A growth mindset with an openness to feedback and continuous learning.

title: Senior Product Manager, Communications Experience
basic: 5+ years of experience in Product Management with a background in human-centric UX.
Demonstrated ability to define product strategy, create and deliver a compelling roadmap, and break down projects into MVPs for high-velocity execution.
Strong systems thinking and ability to partner with engineering on technical details, including data, logic, and system architecture.
Customer-centric approach with experience analyzing user needs and synthesizing research to define problems.
Excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills, with experience writing clear product specifications and partnering closely with design, engineering, and other stakeholders.
Experience mentoring other team members and contributing to team growth and best practices.
A data-driven mindset for setting and tracking goals and milestones.
bonus: Previous experience with communications or notifications features.

title: Senior Product Manager, Project & Task Experience
basic: 5+ years of experience in Product Management.
Ability to think at both a systems level (e.g., data modeling) and a user-centric level (e.g., UX flows).
Strong strategic skills to define product vision, scope solutions for customer problems, and manage a product roadmap.

Experience mentoring other team members and contributing to team growth and best practices.

title: Group Product Manager, Logistics
basic: 8+ years of experience in product management or a similar role
Team management experience (direct or indirect), including developing others and giving feedback
Strong marketplace or systems thinking, with the ability to analyze multi-sided interactions and make data-informed tradeoffs
Strong cross-functional (XFN) communication skills to explain complex problems and solutions to teams and leadership

title: Group Product Manager, Logistics

title: Senior Product Manager, Catalog

Proven ability to set strategy, prioritize tasks, and deliver high-quality outcomes in a fast-paced environment.
Proficiency in data-driven decision-making, including defining KPIs, partnering with analytics, and interpreting experiments.

title: Senior Product Manager, Catalog
basic: Experience in Product Management, owning complex, cross-functional programs with measurable impact.

title: Senior Product Manager, Consumer Insights Portal
basic: 3+ years in Product Management or related roles at a technology company, with experience serving B2B clients from SMBs to large corporations.
Demonstrated retail knowledge, with a preference for experience in consumer analytic solutions.
Experience managing technical, data-heavy products and a proven ability to solve complex problems with a customer-first approach.
Proven ability to scale early-stage products by focusing on MVP, creative problem-solving, and fostering engagement with early adopters.

Strong data-driven and analytical problem-solving skills.
Comfort with ambiguity and building novel products in conceptually challenging spaces without clear precedents.

Experience in SaaS Product Management.
Thrives in fast-paced, ambiguous environments with a high degree of autonomy.

title: Senior Product Manager, Consumer Insights Portal
basic: 3+ years of Product Management or related experience at a technology company, working with B2B clients of varying sizes (SMB to S&P 500).

Demonstrated leadership and project ownership skills, with experience driving key metrics while managing budgets

title: Senior Product Manager, Incentives Efficiency
basic: 5+ years of product management experience

title: [2026] Associate Product Manager, Early Career
basic: Pursuing or holding an undergraduate/graduate degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Business, Mathematics, or a related field
Passion for building products and features that delight users
Curiosity and ability to identify user motivations
Strong communication and presentation skills, with an eagerness to share ideas with diverse audiences

title: Principal Product Manager, Matchmaking
basic: 8+ years of product management experience
Formal degree in a technical or applied quantitative field (e.g., Machine learning, Statistics, Computer Science, Operations Research)
Strong technical understanding of distributed systems, algorithms, and data-driven product development, including working on architecture and trade-offs
Metrics-driven with the ability to translate product changes into measurable outcomes like retention and session quality
Player- and creator-centric mindset with a strong intuition for user experience and creator goals
Experience leading through influence and collaborating cross-functionally with product, engineering, design, and data teams
Self-directed and comfortable operating in ambiguity on large-scale systems
bonus: Experience in large-scale systems, infrastructure, or consumer platforms
Familiarity with matchmaking systems, real-time infrastructure, or recommender systems

title: Senior Product Advocate (Game Product Manager)
basic: 7+ years of experience in product management and/or data analysis for F2P mobile games or other consumer-facing products.
Expertise in F2P monetization features, live operations (LiveOps), and managing complex game ecosystems.

Ability to consult with game developers on data-informed game design, live operations, and user acquisition.
Experience using game development knowledge to consult on shaping positive player behavior.
Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to articulate the 'why' behind product decisions.
A passion for game development.
Ability to engage and inspire developer teams.
bonus: Proficiency with SQL.
